india.headerSubtitle: Personalized homeopathic care, priced in rupees.

plans.name: 3 Months
bullets: Better value than the 1 Month Plan

plans.name: 6 Months
bullets: Best for chronic conditions requiring continued treatment

plans.name: 12 Months
bullets: Lowest monthly cost for patients requiring long-term care

notes: Best quality homeopathic medicines are provided.
Plan valid for patients residing in India only.
Medicines are shipped in batches of 1–2 months at a time.
Additional products (syrups, drops, ointments, shampoos, oils) may be prescribed if required.
Cost of such products will be billed separately.
Prices are inclusive of all taxes.

global.headerSubtitle: The same care, wherever you're calling from.

plans.name: 6 Months
bullets: Best for chronic conditions requiring continued treatment

notes: Valid for patients residing outside India only.
Best quality homeopathic medicines are provided.
Medicines are shipped in batches of 3 months at a time.
Prices are inclusive of all taxes.

nriPricing.heading: NRI Pricing
nriPricing.body:
Patients of Indian origin living abroad may be eligible for special pricing.

If you are an NRI or OCI cardholder, please contact our team before enrolling to discuss available treatment plans and medicine delivery options.
nriPricing.disclaimer: Special pricing is subject to eligibility and approval.
